violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Several towels left in the prep area and on the cooking line, not in sanitizer between uses.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Oven cooking bacon not underneath the hood system.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Pans used on the bottom shelf of the prep table were not being changed out and had excess debris build up.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use items on the cooking line should be inverted.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. The freezer floor has deteriorated and is no longer a clean-able surface. Floors underneath the equipment on the cooking line need to be cleaned.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Mops in the back by the office were wet and stored on the floor, not allowing them to dry properly.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Chemical spray bottle and glass cleaner stored alongside single-use items in front counter area.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
